hero.subtitle: Design Studio
hero.title: Noble Flair Design
hero.description: Bringing elegance to every detail. Presentation design, printing, education, and exclusive epoxy resin jewelry.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We create design with soul
about.text1: Noble Flair Design is a space where elegance and individuality are born. We specialize in presentation design, advertising materials, and printing.
about.text2: Our mission is to help you shine. Through education, ready-made design solutions, or unique epoxy resin jewelry — we are with you at every step.
about.feature1_desc: Every project is unique, just like our approach to it
about.feature2_desc: We use the best materials and modern techniques
about.feature3_desc: From idea to implementation — we handle everything

course.title: Course: The Art of Presentations
course.subtitle: Turn your ideas into a visual masterpiece
course.description: Learn to create presentations that leave a lasting impression. From composition to delivery — a complete presentation design course for beginners and professionals.
course.status: The course is in development. Leave your details to get notified about the launch!

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: What we offer
services.design_desc: Presentations, banners, branding, and visual content for business, social media, and marketing campaigns.
services.websites_desc: Modern websites, landing pages, and corporate portals. Responsive design, optimization, and ongoing support.
services.printing_desc: Business cards, flyers, brochures, invitations. Full cycle: design + printing + delivery across Ukraine.
services.epoxy_desc: Unique handmade jewelry pieces. Pendants, earrings, bracelets — every detail crafted with love.

vacancies.title: Vacancies
vacancies.subtitle: Join the Noble Flair Design team
vacancies.description: We are always looking for talented people. If you are a designer, manager, or creative individual — write to us!
vacancies.no_open: There are no open vacancies at the moment, but you can still send us your resume — we will review it when a position opens up.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you want to know about the course
faq.course_format_a: The course is fully online. You get access to video lessons, text content, and supplementary materials on the platform. Learn at your own pace — access to materials is gradually unlocked.
faq.duration_q: How long does the course take?
faq.duration_a: The course takes 4-6 weeks with regular study of 2-3 hours per week. You can go faster or slower — there are no time constraints within your plan.
faq.tools_a: PowerPoint or Google Slides is sufficient for most lessons. A dedicated module covers Figma — and it's free. All links and resources are provided within the course.
faq.certificate_a: Yes, upon completing the course you receive an electronic certificate. For the Standard and VIP plans, the certificate is included in the price.
faq.support_q: Is there support during the course?
faq.support_a: Yes! All students have access to a Telegram chat. The VIP plan includes priority support with personal mentorship.
faq.refund_a: We stand by the quality of our course. If after the first three lessons you find it's not for you — we'll refund the full amount within 14 days.
